FINAL FAIRNESS AND APPROVAL HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Alexander Davies, Esq., of Aegis Law Firm, PC, Tel. 949-379-6250), appearing for the Plaintiff;
Seth Weisburst, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP, Tel. 415-875-3276, appearing for defendant Progress Glass Co., Inc.

Hearing re: FINAL FAIRNESS AND APPROVAL HEARING.

The matter is not contested. No argument is held. Mr. Davies states that this morning's appearances are to ensure that there are no in-person contestants.

The Court notes that there are no in-person contestants. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement is granted.

The Court will review the order submitted by counsel with the moving papers. The clerk will contact counsel if the Court needs a new proposed order.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Nguyen. (301/RCE)
